title: Swiggy Restaurant Scraper Input
description: Collect public restaurant listing data from Swiggy by city, locality, and cuisine. For a low-cost test, use one city, one cuisine, maxResults 5, and India residential proxy.

cities.title: Cities
cities.description: Cities to scrape, for example Bangalore, Mumbai, Delhi, Pune, Hyderabad, Chennai, Kolkata, or Ahmedabad. Start with one city for tests.

localities.title: Localities / Areas
localities.description: Optional areas within the city. Leave empty to search the city page for a lower-cost test.

cuisines.title: Cuisine filters
cuisines.description: Optional cuisine filters such as pizza, Chinese, North Indian, Italian, Biryani, or South Indian. Start with one cuisine for tests.

sortBy.title: Sort order
sortBy.description: Preferred result sorting when Swiggy exposes sorting controls.

maxResults.title: Maximum restaurants
maxResults.description: Maximum unique restaurant records to save across selected cities and filters. Use 5-10 for test runs.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: India residential proxies are recommended for reliable regional access and are billed as platform usage.
